question_text: Let 𝑿𝟏, 𝑿𝟐, … , 𝑿𝟐𝟓 be a random sample of size 25 from a population having 𝑁3(𝝁, Σ) distribution, where 𝝁 and non-singular Σ are unknown parameters. Let 𝑆= 24 ∑ (𝑿𝑗−𝑿̅)(𝑿𝑗−𝑿̅) 𝑗=1 , where 𝑿⁡̅ = 25 ∑ 𝑗=1 , and 𝐵=⁡[ 1 1]. Then which one of the following statements is true?

options.A: 24⁡𝐵𝑆𝐵𝑇 follows a Wishart distribution of order 3 with 24 degrees of freedom
options.B: 24⁡𝐵𝑆𝐵𝑇 follows a Wishart distribution of order 2 with 25 degrees of freedom
options.C: 24⁡𝐵𝑆𝐵𝑇 follows a Wishart distribution of order 2 with 24 degrees of freedom
options.D: 24⁡𝐵𝑆𝐵𝑇 follows a Wishart distribution of order 3 with 25 degrees of freedom
